text: Curiosity tingles within me as I stand before this display of innovation and intellect—everything feels intentional, yet there is an undercurrent of ambiguity, a quiet unease at the intersection of human and machine. The bold colors and words on the wall invite contemplation, drawing me to search for the deeper meaning in our drive to connect and create. Here, surrounded by the products of thought and design, I feel both inspired and somewhat alien, marveling at how technology reflects—and perhaps reshapes—what it means to be human.
